{"id": "linear_5477c0808ac2", "key": "CAO", "name": "Client Accounting Operations", "created_at": "2026-03-03T08:45:00Z", "updated_at": "2026-05-20T17:10:00Z", "description": "Partner-led outsourced accounting team handling daily close blocker triage, client bank feed exceptions, cash posting follow-up, AP workflow reviews, and bookkeeping remediation for external clients. The team regularly works through reconciliation items like BL-18FFAE0E20D0 on 117000 Allowance for Doubtful Accounts, investigates open exceptions such as exc_af7274fb658844 and exc_4d5d3582698946, and coordinates invoice processing across items including VEN-019-583136 and VEN-012-211225 during monthly close and onboarding cycles.", "is_archived": false}

{"id": "linear_7d4b3f1127cd", "key": "TCD", "name": "Tax & Compliance Delivery", "created_at": "2026-04-14T09:20:00Z", "updated_at": "2026-05-31T15:35:00Z", "description": "External client tax, entity compliance, and filing readiness team overseeing tax document chase lists, annual report catch-up, filing calendar exceptions, and audit/PBC support. The team reviews due-date risk tied to vendor support items like VEN-004-799133, follows period-specific adjustments including JE-brookfield-FP-2026-05-0004 and JE-northstar_legal-FP-2026-05-0002, and escalates unresolved approval items such as exc_abd8e711f5f347 and exc_cb0a9a94a3084c when they affect filing readiness or advisory delivery.", "is_archived": false}
